narrative.challenge: The platform lacked a configurable analysis layer. Account Managers couldn't combine ratings, response tables, score summaries, and contextual labels into a single shared surface — creating a critical churn risk at the enterprise tier against competitors who had already moved to configurable dashboards.

title: Designing Decision Clarity for a B2B Experience Management Platform
description: When Account Managers can't build dashboards confidently, enterprise clients can't act on their data. I designed a real-time, modular custom dashboard that closed four critical competitive gaps and replaced a manual email reporting chain with governed live sharing.
ndaNote: Employer and product details anonymised at their request. Full context available under mutual NDA.
